changelog: FIX (app-wide nav bug) — Pressing BACK from the player or any detail screen was always returning to the Discover/Continue-Watching tab regardless of which section the user was on. Root cause: TVMainMenuScreen's currentPage state used remember() instead of rememberSaveable(), so every re-mount (after popBackStack) reset the tab. Switched to rememberSaveable so the user's selected section (Sports / Collections / Themed / Genres / etc.) survives navigation.

FIX (Sports-specific) — BACK from a player launched via the EPG picker now reopens the picker (showing the same channel list for that game) instead of jumping straight to the Sports page. BACK again exits to Sports. pickerGameId is now rememberSaveable.
